Resolves #13983

Golden Path handoff generation now makes the forecast self-describing and stops inventing fallback rationale when the model-generated Strategic Interpretation is unavailable. The handoff gains a `Golden Path Forecast Status` section with generated timestamp, status, route provenance, and candidate-count diagnostics; invalid or failed Strategic Interpretation generation now renders an explicit degraded reason instead of synthetic priority prose.

Evidence: L2 focused unit/static/doc verification is complete. Residual: L3 post-merge orchestrator validation should confirm the next generated `resources/content/sandman_handoff.md` contains the new forecast-status section and no deterministic Strategic Interpretation fallback prose.

## Deltas from ticket

The ticket body allowed "compact deterministic fallback"; the owner comment on #13983 rejected that path. This PR implements the narrowed contract: Strategic Interpretation remains present, but model failure renders a degraded reason only.
